purpose: Generate a text-free cover background for an introductory AI Agent course
audience: English-speaking readers beginning to learn AI engineering

prompt.subject: A small white robot arranging blue task cards on a desk
prompt.action: The robot lays out three cards in a clear workflow
prompt.composition: 4:5 portrait, medium shot, subject positioned in the lower center, with a 25% title-safe area at the top
prompt.lighting: Soft cool-white light, with a subtle blue rim light emphasizing the subject
prompt.style: Minimal vector illustration, low-saturation blue-and-white palette, consistent-weight outlines
prompt.text_rendering: Do not generate text; typography will be added in post-production
must_include: a title-safe area at the top

governance.deletion_propagation_plan: When access is revoked or content is deleted, make associated candidates, derived outputs, caches, and accessible links unavailable while retaining minimal audit events.

risk.provenance_plan: Retain source_revision, transform_id, release_id, and input/output hashes; attach and verify C2PA Content Credentials where supported by the provider.
risk.disclosure_plan: Label the publication page as AI-assisted generation and record the manual typography steps; publish external factual claims only when supported by independent evidence.

acceptance.criterion: The robot, three cards, and title-safe area are all present
The subject is not cropped, and the top safe area contains no essential elements
The image contains no gibberish text, URLs, or logos
The robot and card shapes are intact, with coherent perspective and lighting
The image contains no real people, sensitive content, or factual claims supported only by generated imagery
The image contains no unauthorized logos, characters, or reference assets

reproducibility.seed_policy: Record it when the provider supports it, but do not promise cross-version determinism
